name: Add eco news to favorites by id -- @1.4
fullName: Add Eco News to Favorites: Add eco news to favorites by id

steps.name: Given I am an authorized user
When I send request to add eco news with id "77" to favorites
Then the response status code should be 404
And the response message post request should be "Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 77"

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 77

parameterValues: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 77
